name: ONEVIEW-817: Verify existing Preferred Layout is overwritten on Save @regression

steps.name: Wait for selector getByText('Verifying account status')
Wait for selector getByRole('menuitem', { name: /Edit Layout/i }).or(getByRole('button', { name: /Edit Layout/i })).or(getByText('Edit Layout', { exact: true })).first()
Click getByRole('menuitem', { name: /Edit Layout/i }).or(getByRole('button', { name: /Edit Layout/i })).or(getByText('Edit Layout', { exact: true })).first()

Wait for selector locator('[class*="banner"]').filter({ hasText: /Edit Mode active/i }).or(locator('[class*="info"]').filter({ hasText: /Edit Mode active/i })).or(locator('[class*="alert"]').filter({ hasText: /Edit Mode active/i })).first()
Wait for selector locator('[class*="border-grey-300"], [class*="border-grey-600"]').filter({ has: locator('[data-state]') }).first().locator('[data-state]').nth(1)
